_comment: Vapi tool definitions for Junk Haul Calgary. Create each as a 'Function' tool in the Vapi dashboard. Set the Server URL of every tool (or the assistant-level server URL) to https://junkhaul.ca/api/vapi and add header 'x-vapi-secret' = VAPI_SERVER_SECRET. Names must match lib/vapiTools.js exactly.

tools.name: check_availability
tools.description: Get open pickup slots. Optionally filter by a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD) or day_type ('thursday' or 'sunday').

tools.name: get_quote
tools.description: Get a price quote for a load size plus optional add-ons.

freon_count.description: Number of freon appliances (if has_freon is true)

tools.name: create_booking
tools.description: Create a booking. Texts the customer a link to pay the $50 deposit. Only Thursdays and Sundays are valid job dates.

freon_count.description: Number of freon appliances (if has_freon is true)

tools.name: lookup_booking
tools.description: Look up an existing booking by reference code or phone number.

tools.name: cancel_booking
tools.description: Cancel a booking by its reference code. Applies the cancellation/refund policy automatically.

tools.name: reschedule_booking
tools.description: Reschedule a booking to a new date and time. Max 2 reschedules per booking. Only Thursdays and Sundays.

tools.name: add_to_waitlist
tools.description: Add a caller to the waitlist when no slots are available.

tools.name: issue_refund
tools.description: Issue a full or partial refund via Stripe for a booking.

refund_type.description: Full refunds the entire deposit; partial refunds a specific amount

amount.description: Amount in CAD for partial refunds (ignored for full)

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send a branded HTML email to a customer or team member.

body.description: Plain text body (will be wrapped in branded HTML)

tools.name: escalate_to_human
tools.description: Escalate a call to a human operator. Sends an SMS to the operator immediately.

tools.name: notify_operator
tools.description: Send an urgent text message to the operator.

tools.name: get_calgary_info
tools.description: Get live Calgary information: weather, news, events, traffic.

query.description: What to look up: weather, news, events, traffic, or general

tools.name: get_sports_info
tools.description: Get live Calgary sports info: Flames, Stampeders, scores, schedules.

query.description: What to look up: flames, hockey, football, scores, etc.

tools.name: get_job_photos
tools.description: Retrieve job photos (customer + crew arrival/completion) for a booking.

tools.name: get_booking_details
tools.description: Get full booking details by phone number or reference code.

tools.name: escalate_to_owner
tools.description: Escalate an issue directly to the business owner. Creates a record and sends SMS.

tools.name: log_compensation
tools.description: Log a compensation offered to a customer (free removal, refund, etc.).
